title: StyleProfile
description: Versioned stylistic fingerprint of an author, computed from their corpus by the ai_pipeline extractor. Single source of truth for the fit_score and the conditioned generation prompt.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bump when adding/removing fields. Consumers must reject profiles with unknown versions.

author_id.description: Unique slug for the author. Preloaded: 'austen', 'dickens', 'poe'.

computed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when this StyleProfile was computed.

corpus_stats.description: High-level statistics of the cleaned corpus used for extraction.

n_documents.description: Number of source documents (cleaned .txt files) used.

n_tokens.description: Total token count across all documents (spaCy tokenization). Minimum 30k enforced.

n_sentences.description: Total sentence count across all documents (spaCy sentence segmentation).

lexical.description: Vocabulary richness and word-level features. See docs/style_features.md §1.

mattr_500.description: Moving Average Type-Token Ratio with window=500. Measures vocabulary richness, stable across corpus size. Higher = richer vocabulary per 500-token block.

avg_word_length.description: Mean number of characters per alpha token (punctuation excluded). Poe > Dickens > Austen.

hapax_ratio.description: Proportion of lemma types appearing exactly once in the full corpus. High in Poe (exotic vocabulary).

syntactic.description: Sentence architecture features computed via spaCy dependency parser. See docs/style_features.md §2.

avg_sentence_length_tokens.description: Mean sentence length in tokens across the full corpus.

std_sentence_length_tokens.description: Standard deviation of sentence length in tokens. High std = high rhythm variation (Dickens).

subordination_ratio.description: Subordinate clauses per sentence (advcl, relcl, ccomp, xcomp dep labels). Normalized per sentence.

noun_to_verb_ratio.description: NOUN token count / VERB token count. High = nominal/descriptive style (Austen, Dickens). Low = verbal/action style (Poe).

passive_voice_ratio.description: Proportion of sentences containing at least one nsubjpass token. High in Poe (Gothic distance effect).

stylistic.description: Surface-level style patterns: punctuation, POS distribution, narrator perspective. See docs/style_features.md §3.

punct_distribution.description: Relative frequency of each punctuation mark over all punctuation tokens. Values sum to ~1.0.

pos_distribution.description: Relative frequency of each universal POS tag over all non-punctuation tokens. Values sum to 1.0.

dialogue_ratio.description: Proportion of non-punctuation tokens inside quotation marks. Austen ~0.33, Dickens ~0.24, Poe ~0.09.

first_person_ratio.description: Frequency of first-person singular pronouns (I, me, my, mine, myself) per 1000 tokens. Poe ~24, Dickens ~6, Austen ~1.

distinctive_vocab.description: Top-30 terms most characteristic of this author vs the other two, ranked by TF-IDF score. See docs/style_features.md §4.

score.description: TF-IDF score relative to the 3-author base corpus. Higher = more distinctive.

semantic_centroid.description: Mean embedding vector across all ~500-token chunks of the author corpus. Computed with all-mpnet-base-v2 (768-dim). Used for fit_score (cosine similarity) and RAG retrieval. See docs/style_features.md §5.1.

embedding_umap_2d.description: 2D UMAP projection of the semantic_centroid for demo visualization. See docs/style_features.md §5.2.

centroid.description: 2D coordinates [x, y] of the author centroid in UMAP space.

spread.description: Standard deviation of chunk distances to centroid. Measures intra-author semantic consistency.
